rule: No asset-class read can graduate into Macro unless its source family, dataset status, freshness rule, and confidence label are declared.

fred.name: FRED / St. Louis Fed
fred.role: Official and institutional macro time series backbone for yields, rates, money, reserves, spreads, inflation, and selected volatility data.

treasury_fiscaldata.name: U.S. Treasury FiscalData
treasury_fiscaldata.role: Treasury cash balance and federal fiscal/liquidity context where endpoint support is validated.

sec_edgar.name: SEC EDGAR APIs
sec_edgar.role: Company facts, filings, fundamentals, revenue, margins, capex and ticker-level financial statement data.

cftc_cot.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders
cftc_cot.role: Futures positioning context for commodities, rates, FX, metals, and energy.

market_price_provider.name: Market Price Provider
market_price_provider.role: ETF, index, commodity, FX, precious metal, crypto, sector, and basket price data.

manual_research.name: Manual Research Layer
manual_research.role: Temporary declared manual layer for datasets not yet available through a free or stable automated source.

freshnessDefaults.fred: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.treasury_fiscaldata: 7 calendar days unless source frequency is lower
freshnessDefaults.manual_research: 30 calendar days with visible stale warning
